title: Myriopus salzmannii
taxonomy: Myriopus salzmannii is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It is a member of the genus Myriopus, which is often included in the genus Heliotropium. Myriopus salzmannii is native to Mexico and is known to have a specific classification within the plant kingdom. The exact classification of Myriopus salzmannii may vary depending on the source, but it is generally considered to be a perennial herb. Further research may be needed to confirm the exact classification of this plant species.
